meta.description: Pariah Nexus Crusade — Blackstone, Strategic Footings, alliance campaign, Battle Traits, Crusade Relics

blackstone.gaining: From Agendas, mission rules, Crusade Relics, and other sources. Track on Order of Battle Blackstone tally
blackstone.harnessing: Spend Blackstone Fragments to purchase Blackstone Upgrades (Battle Honours and Crusade Relics)
blackstone.salvaging: After battle: spend 5 Blackstone Fragments to grant 5XP to one CHARACTER unit. Once per campaign phase
blackstone.allianceUse: In Pariah Nexus campaign — Blackstone Fragments can be pooled to earn Strategic points

NODAL_MAP.effect: While within range of objective, if Battle-shocked — change OC to 1 instead of 0

SINGLE_MINDED_SEEKER.effect: If bearer is WARLORD — end of battle roll D6 (+2 if won): on 6+, gain 3 Blackstone Fragments

ACQUISITIVE_OPPORTUNIST.effect: If bearer is WARLORD — at battle start gains ability based on Strategic Footing: Aggressive = Scouts 6", Balanced = Lone Operative, Defensive = Stealth

EMPATHIC_DISINCLINATOR.effect: Select one objective at battle start — while bearer on battlefield, friendly units within range have 5+ invulnerable save

NOCTILITH_ARMAMENT.effect: Select melee weapon — once per battle in Fight phase, activate: invulnerable saves cannot be made against attacks with that weapon

BLACKSTONE_AMULET.effect: Each time melee attack allocated to bearer — on unmodified saving throw of 6 (or 5+ for Psychic), attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after attacks resolved

characterUnits.HORROR_HARDENED: Can be targeted with Stratagems even while Battle-shocked
characterUnits.ARCH_ACQUISITOR: +3 to OC of one CHARACTER model
characterUnits.CLAIM_STALKER: While within range of objective — has Stealth ability
characterUnits.HEROIC_CONSTITUTION: +1 to Wounds of one CHARACTER model
characterUnits.DUELLIST: Can re-roll Hit rolls for melee attacks targeting CHARACTER units

monsterAndVehicleUnits.TANK_HUNTER: Re-roll Wound rolls of 1 against MONSTER or VEHICLE
monsterAndVehicleUnits.STUBBORN_EXPLORATOR: Can move over terrain 4" or less as if not there when making Normal or Advance move
monsterAndVehicleUnits.HEAVILY_ARMOURED: Once per battle — change Damage of one attack allocated to model to 0
monsterAndVehicleUnits.REAPER: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 against INFANTRY or MOUNTED

infantryUnits.UNITED_BY_ADVERSITY: Can target this unit with Heroic Intervention for 0CP even if already targeted another unit
infantryUnits.RAIDERS: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 when attacking unit within range of objective
infantryUnits.PURGATORS: Gains GRENADES keyword. If already has it — once per battle, Grenade Stratagem for 0CP
infantryUnits.TERROR_ASSAULT: At start of Fight phase — select enemy in Engagement Range: that unit must take Battle-shock test

mountedUnits.SADDLEBORNE_ASSASSINS: When attacking closest eligible target — improve AP by 1
mountedUnits.LINEBREAKERS: When unit ends Charge move — melee weapons have SUSTAINED HITS 1 until end of turn
mountedUnits.CRUSHING_CHARGE: When unit ends Charge move — roll D6 per model in Engagement Range: on 4+, enemy suffers 1 mortal wound

artificer.BLACKSTONE_COMPASS: After winning battle, if bearer on battlefield — gain 2 additional Blackstone Fragments
artificer.TREASURE_OF_THE_TECHNOMANDRITES: Select weapon — gains LETHAL HITS, PRECISION, or SUSTAINED HITS 1

antiquity.NOCTILITH_SIGIL: Non-PSYKER only. Feel No Pain 4+ against Psychic Attacks for bearer's unit
antiquity.DOLMEN_KEY: Unit has Deep Strike. Can target unit with Rapid Ingress for 0CP — set up more than 6" from enemies within range of objective. Cannot charge until end of turn
antiquity.VANTACHRENS_MIRROR: Unit has Stealth. When bearer's unit targeted by charge — subtract 2 from Charge roll
antiquity.EYE_OF_MARS: After both armies deployed — select one unit from your Crusade army and redeploy it (can go into Strategic Reserves)

legendary.BLADE_OF_THE_DYNAST: +1 to Strength, Damage, and AP of melee weapons. Once per battle in Charge phase (Aggressive footing) — +2 to Charge rolls for bearer's unit
legendary.NOCTIC_SHIELD: +1 to Toughness and Wounds. Once per battle when attack targets bearer's unit (Defensive footing) — until end of phase, subtract 1 from Damage of attacks
legendary.ROD_OF_THE_OMNISSIAH: At start of Command phase, regain up to D3 lost wounds. Once per battle (Balanced footing) — select enemy in Engagement Range: suffers mortal wounds equal to wounds regained

strategicFootings.description: Each player secretly selects Aggressive, Balanced, or Defensive before battle. Revealed simultaneously — determines Attacker and who has Advantage

footings.aggressive: Favours attacking first — typically Attacker or gains Advantage
footings.defensive: Favours defending — typically Defender or opponent gains Advantage

strategicFootings.advantage: Effect varies by mission. Some missions give +1VP opportunities, combat bonuses, or other benefits to player with Advantage
strategicFootings.selectionMatrix: See Pariah Nexus Crusade book for full Attacker/Advantage determination table

blessings.PREPARED_POSITIONS: Until round 2, units in own deployment zone have Benefit of Cover against ranged attacks
blessings.DEFIANCE_UNDIMMED: At end of battle, each non-destroyed unit gains 1XP
blessings.FORTUNE_FAVOURED: Once per battle round — if WARLORD on battlefield, use Command Re-roll for 0CP
blessings.DESPERATE_OFFENSIVE: During round 1, +1" to Move of INFANTRY and WALKER units
blessings.LINCHPIN_LEADERSHIP: Until end of battle, improve Leadership of units in Attached units by 1
blessings.BLACKSTONE_BOUNTY: After battle gain 1 Blackstone Fragment (+1 more if won)
blessings.DEFEND_THE_DIG_SITE: At end of battle, 1 Blackstone Fragment per unit on battlefield (max 3)
blessings.PSYCHIC_SHIELDING: Once per battle in Shooting phase or start of Fight — up to 3 units have Feel No Pain 5+ against Psychic Attacks until end of phase
blessings.NOCTILITH_AUGURY: After Strategic Footing revealed — can change your footing

factionBlessings.EMPOWERED_BY_FAITH: IMPERIUM only — once per battle at start of Command phase: until next Command phase, Attached units can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests
factionBlessings.RIGHTFUL_HEIRS: NECRONS only — at start of Command phase, select one NECRONS INFANTRY unit: +1 OC until next Command phase
factionBlessings.UNEXPECTED_MEDDLERS: Non-IMPERIUM and non-NECRONS — after deployment, select up to 2 units and redeploy them (can go into Strategic Reserves)

alliances.Seekers: Harvest blackstone and end the Stilling — best for Imperium forces
alliances.Protectors: Protect blackstone from others — best for Necrons

campaign.tiebreaker: Alliance with most Blackstone Fragments wins if Strategic Points tied

agendas: TO_THE_LAST — 2XP per selected non-destroyed unit + 1XP if not Below Half-strength + 1 Blackstone Fragment per non-destroyed
CRITICAL_RESOURCES — 2XP per unit within range of opponent-selected objectives + 1 Blackstone per selected unit
KING_SLAYER — 2XP + 1 Blackstone per CHARACTER unit destroyed (max 4 Blackstone). +2XP for WARLORD
DRIVE_HOME_THE_BLADE — 3XP per unit within 6" of opponent's battlefield edge
RECOVER_BLACKSTONE_DATA — 1XP or 2XP + 1CP for controlling non-deployment zone objective. +1 Blackstone per XP gained (max 3)
CENTRAL_POSITION — 1XP per CHARACTER within 3" of centre at end of Command phase. 4 Blackstone Fragments if 4+ XP gained
REAP_A_TALLY — For every 3rd enemy unit destroyed: 2XP + 1 Blackstone (max 2) to unit that destroyed them
PSYCHIC_BEACONS — 2XP + 4 Blackstone — 2+ PSYKER CHARACTERS in different table quarters
RE_ESTABLISH_COMMUNICATION — 4XP + 4 Blackstone — control opponent-selected Comms Array with CHARACTER at battle end
